creator: Darryl L. Pierce
description: This week I take on the third part of our Terminator franchise review when I watch "Terminator 3: Rise Of The Machines" from 2003. And Misfitboy gets us into the zone with "Nightmare At 20,000 Feet" and "Stopover In A Quiet Town".
